subject: refactor(style): split Spacing section into Spacing and Frames
body:
Spacing and Frames were combined in one collapsible section. Now
separated into two independent sections for clearer organization.

Style tab sections are now: Typography, Color Tint, Background,
Spacing, Frames.

Tags: style, ui, ux, spacing, frames
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cell-customization
Semver: patch
